author: Dr. Lizard
title: What is the target INR range for a mechanical mitral valve?
detail: Mechanical mitral valves are more thrombogenic than aortic ones.
Low-dose aspirin is often added to warfarin unless there is a bleeding contraindication.
releaseNote: For patients with a mechanical mitral valve prosthesis, a target INR of 3.0 (range 2.5 to 3.5) is recommended with warfarin.
